# ParagonTooltipChrome.OrnateFrameLight property

Light variant of [`OrnateFrame`](./OrnateFrame.md) (`TooltipFrameLight`, sno `603057`) — same 9 piece handles, alternative composition. The consumer picks whichever matches the desired brightness.
